code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  for t in toks
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      nums = list.push(nums, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  let n = nums.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match nums.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if has_prev and v == prev
        ()
      else
        out = list.push(out, v)
        prev = v
        has_prev = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut result = ""
  mut j = 0
  let m = out.len()
  while j < m
    match out.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        result = "#{v}"
      else
        result = "#{result} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
